title: Blend 001199 and 001198 with small 001198 shrink
summary: Add only a small 15 percent contribution from 001198 to the stronger 001199 parent.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199 behavior. Create pred_001199 and pred_001198 under the same folds. Set final predictions to 0.85 * pred_001199 + 0.15 * pred_001198. Keep the blend fixed, not learned.
expected_effect: Test whether 001198 is mainly useful as a light stabilizer rather than an equal partner.
risk: A fixed small blend can still hurt if 001198 is just noise relative to 001199.
